name: Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light Olive Oil (or vegetable oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic.
2. Add the chopped garlic and all remaining ingredients except the oil to a food processor.
3. Blend until everything is well combined.
4. Slowly add the oil while continuing to blend.
5. Blend for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Tear up one head of romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
7. Mix approximately half of the dressing with the lettuce.
8. Sprinkle the lettuce with 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, 1/4 cup bacon bits, and 1/2 cup croutons.
9. Mix everything together and serve.
10. Store any remaining dressing in the refrigerator. It will keep for about 5 days. For best results, prepare the dressing in the morning for dinner that night.
